text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I'm passing by the fields one day, when...

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Brilliant! Your skin has a most lustrous shine!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Elegant! You have a nice firm surface as well. It
reflects a proper upbringing!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Oho? Why, what a coincidence! Welcome,
welcome!
choice_data_list: Umm... What are you doing here?

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Excellent question! I was just commending these
fine carrots on their attributes!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Listen well! I desire to create a comfortable
environment for all this academy's students.
Naturally, high-quality carrots are essential!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
I require carrots high in nutritional value—carrots
that will make the mouth water... In other words,
carrots grown with love!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Indisputable! Carrots grow best when given love
and encouragement, just like Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
And the essence of love is respect and resolve! It
requires the insight to see somebody's true
nature, and the wherewithal to treat them with
dignity!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
To watch over them to the end, come what may!
To praise them and push them to their fullest
potential!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: That is love! But perhaps a more concrete example is in order.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Director Akikawa squats down and pulls out a
carrot.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Crunch!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Like so!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Delectable! This flavor is the mark of a carrot well
grown. The reward of the conscientious gardener!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
My vision! I want to see every Umamusume
mature as surely as these carrots.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Until that day, I'll do whatever I can to aid them
on their way!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Director Akikawa's analogy is a little hard to
follow, but there's no doubting her passion.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Encouragement! Grow, my carrots! Grow strong
and sturdy enough to reach the sky!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Only then will you become high-quality food for
our Umamusume! Now is the time to grow,
carrots!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's clear as day that Director Akikawa sincerely
cares for her students.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And that sincerity is something I firmly believe
deserves respect. Which leads me to say...
choice_data_list: Shall I help you with the field work?

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Shocking! What a bolt from the blue!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Very well! If you are willing to help, I would be
delighted!
choice_data_list: I'll start by plowing the field.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
My thanks! The students and the carrots are
relying on you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to my daily training with
<chrname>, I've been putting on
muscle recently. Power wells up from within me,
and I plow the field easily!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Progress! Splendid work! Oh, do over there next!
And this spot over here!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Marvelous! Now the fields are ready to sow new
seeds.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Fine work, indeed! How ever can I thank you?
choice_data_list: Could I have some new training gear?
Could I have some of those carrots?

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Signed and sealed! I present you with these!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
These cutting-edge training shoes were
developed using Umamusume engineering.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Thus! I have dubbed them... Tracen Academy
Cleats! I oversaw the whole design process
myself, from planning to supervision!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
No need to thank me! The best results require the
best equipment!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
These shoes will serve as the perfect "carrots" for
raising a fine racer.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Expectations! Please keep raising your
Umamusume with love and care!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Director Akikawa radiates palpable enthusiasm.
I'll give these shoes to <chrname>
right away.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Every aspect of these shoes is overflowing with
Director Akikawa's love for the Umamusume in
her care, down to their very structure.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two of us can almost hear cries of
"Encouragement!" whenever my trainee puts
pressure on her heel. It motivates both of us to
train harder than ever!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Understood! Then come, join me in praising these
fine carrots!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
You there! How magnificently large you are!
You've grown big and strong like a tree!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Your turn! Give them the praise they deserve!
choice_data_list:
Look how orange you are! You must be
nutritious!

Look how orange you are! You must be
nutritious!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Splendid! Marvelous! What a compliment!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Truly, my academy produces only the best
trainers!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Conviction! You have made these carrots even
more delicious!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Later, a large volume of carrots arrives at my
door—a gift from Director Akikawa.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I rope in <chrname> and some passing
friends, and we throw a lavish carrot party.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After thoroughly enjoying the carrots,
<chrname> has loads more energy for
training!
